div1.entryFree: Negligent, wanting care and attention: LLL III, 36. Wint. I, 2, 247. Wint. I, 2, 247 Wint. I, 2, 247 H6A IV, 2, 44. Troil. III, 3, 41. Ant. III, 7, 26. till we perceived, both how you were wrong led, and we in n. danger, III, 6, 81 (== a danger of negligence, i. e. a danger arising from our continued negligence).
